summary: Outstanding audience recording that captures a high‑energy 1973 Roosevelt Stadium show highlighted by Black Peter, a smoking Loose Lucy and a blistering China Cat Sunflower › I Know You Rider sequence.
review: Fans rave about the electric vibe of this July 31, 1973 performance – especially the second set with Black Peter, Loose Lucy, China‑Rider and the epic Promised Land › Bertha › Greatest Story.  The audience tape is surprisingly clear for its era, delivering crowd ambience while remaining very listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Average rating ≈ 4.7/5 from 18 reviews; overwhelmingly positive comments on both the music and the surprisingly high‑quality audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Presence of crowd noise adds immediacy; overall crisp for an AUD tape, slight tinny character from the 1973 PA but very listenable and well‑balanced.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
Promised Land > Bertha > Greatest Story Ever Told
show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set builds strong energy that explodes in the second set; seamless transitions (e.g., China‑Rider into a massive Promised Land › Bertha › Greatest Story) keep the momentum high.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers note his birthday celebration, partying hard and delivering scorching guitar work.
band_member_comments.Phil: Praised for a memorable bass solo around the 9‑minute mark and for making the floor vibrate with his playing.
